mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE keycloak_id = #{keycloakId}::uuid AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT u.*, COUNT(d.draft_id) AS post_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN blog_post_drafts d ON u.user_id = d.author_id AND d.is_deleted = false WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = false GROUP BY u.user_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE is_deleted = false AND role = #{role}
AND (first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, bio = #{bio}, is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
